description_long: This is a roughly hewn, irregularly shaped stone with a pale, translucent appearance, likely quartz or a similar mineral. Its surface is mostly matte with some subtle, natural luster, and it displays a mix of off-white, light beige, and faint greenish hues. The stone has a few angular facets and edges, with some areas appearing slightly smoother and others more granular. There is a small, partially torn label affixed to one side, suggesting it may have been cataloged or collected. The stone's mass and density are evident from its solid, compact form, and it lacks any visible cavities or openings. Subtle mineral inclusions and faint veining are visible, adding to its natural, unrefined character.
description: A pale, irregularly shaped stone with a matte, slightly lustrous surface and subtle mineral veining. It features off-white, beige, and faint greenish tones with a small label attached.
description_view_0: This view shows a prominent angular face with a small, white label attached, and highlights the stone's pale, slightly translucent surface.
description_view_1: This side reveals a smoother, more uniform surface with a faint greenish patch and less visible labeling.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the stone's irregular, multi-faceted geometry and subtle beige and white color variations.
description_view_3: This view displays a broad, relatively flat face with minimal color variation and no visible label.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or decorative barrier
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural veining and mottling with irregular, granular texture; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Slightly weathered with some smooth and some granular areas, indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts gently with paved surfaces or manicured greenery, often placed as a visual accent or low barrier.
